folio.label: 49v
folio.l: What wyl ©e don , while æat it is in hand

note.notetxt: 115 Size of the script is larger in line 115/116.ODR

folio.l: By god rigút by the hoper , wyl I stand
Quod Ioún , and se how the corn gas In
ñet saw I neuäe , be my fader kyn
How that the hoper , wagges tyl and fra
Aleyn answered , Ioún wylt thow swa
Than wyl I be by nethe , be my crounö
And se how that the mele , falles dounö
In tyl the trow , that shal be myn disport
For Ioún in faith , I may be of ©oure sort
I is as ille a Myllere , as ar ©e
¢ This Millere smyletú , at here nycete
And thougút , al this nys , but for a wyle
They wene æ noman , may he~ begyle
But be my thrift , ©et shal I blere here eye
For al the sleigút , in here philosophie
The more queynt crekes , that they make
The more wol I stele , whan I take
In stede of flour , ©et wol I ©eue he~ bren
The grettest Clerkes , be nat the wysest men
As whilom to the wolf , thus spak the Mare
Of al here art , counte I nat a tare
Ou©t at the dore , he goth ful preuyly
Whan æat he saugú his tyme , softly
He loketú vp and dounö , til he had found
The Clerkes hors , there as it stod I bound
Behynde the Mylle , vnder a lefselle
And to the hors , he goth hi~ faire & wele
And strepeth of the brydel , rigút a nonö
And whan the hors was loos , he begynnetú to gon
Toward the fen , there wylde Mares renne
And forth with we he , thorugú thikke & thenne
¢ This Millere goth a geyn , no word he seid
But doth his note , & witú the Clerkes pleyd
Til that here cornö , was faire & wel I g¼unde
And whan the Mele is sakked , & I bounde
This Ioún gotú ou©t , and fynt his hors a wey
And gan to crye herrowe , and weylawey
Oure hors is lost , Aleyn for goddes banes
Step~ on thy fete , come of man al at anes
Allas oure wardeyn , has his palfrey lornö
This Aleyn , al forgat , bothe Mele and cornö
Al was oute of his mynde , his husbondrye
What whilk weye is he gan , he gan crye

note.notetxt: 158 the colour of the ink in this folio begins as brown and becomes light brown towards the end of the folio. It is not possible to see the precise point as to where the divsion starts if there was one at all.ODR
